name: The Key
short_description: It is a multiplayer, competitive combat game with support for 8 players per game. Your objective is to obtain 3 keys and survive to create your own path to the helicopter on the map which is your victory point.
detailed_description:
It is a multiplayer, competitive combat game with support for 8 players per game. Your objective is to obtain 3 keys and survive to create your own path to the helicopter on the map which is your victory point.

Enhance your character's gameplay with skills and the possibility of obtaining 9 types of weapons with 5 different levels available in the game. Arm devices, become invisible, fly around the city but remember to always examine your surroundings.
about_the_game:
It is a multiplayer, competitive combat game with support for 8 players per game. Your objective is to obtain 3 keys and survive to create your own path to the helicopter on the map which is your victory point.

Enhance your character's gameplay with skills and the possibility of obtaining 9 types of weapons with 5 different levels available in the game. Arm devices, become invisible, fly around the city but remember to always examine your surroundings.
supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
